title: Scenario 09 Revocation Visibility / Split-State Claim Boundary Contract
claims_not_allowed_to_be_inferred: stale intermediate state establishes current authority
stale intermediate state establishes current policy satisfaction
stale intermediate state establishes current evidence sufficiency
stale intermediate state establishes current execution eligibility
non_inheritance_rule: No validity-changing event becomes globally visible, globally consumed, or globally operative merely because it exists in one system; and no local non-awareness establishes current validity.
fork_non_authority_statement: Fork does not approve, certify, score, authorize, determine compliance, determine admissibility, establish legal sufficiency, decide acceptance, judge correctness, determine negligence, or determine excuse.
